ew_context: Double top completion suggests end of corrective rally - potential wave B termination leading into impulsive wave C decline
pattern_desc: Clean double top formation with peaks at 0.5699 and 0.5698. Failed attempt to break above resistance confirms bearish reversal from key level.
invalidation: Close above 0.5700 on H4 timeframe breaks the double top resistance and negates the bearish reversal pattern
market_context: CAD weakness against CHF amid risk-off sentiment and Swiss franc safe-haven demand during geopolitical uncertainty
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Perfect double top formation has emerged with near-identical peaks at 0.5699 and 0.5698, showing clear rejection from this resistance zone. Current entry at 0.5680 represents optimal positioning after the second peak failure. EMA alignment (EMA20: 0.5685 = EMA50: 0.5685) shows neutral short-term momentum, but the pattern suggests bearish resolution.

RSI at 37.8% indicates oversold momentum already building, while ATR of 0.0010 shows contained volatility within the pattern. The laminar flow with momentum alignment supports the bearish breakdown thesis from this major reversal formation.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 0.5699 (double top peaks and pattern resistance)
- **Support**: 0.5668 (intermediate support), 0.5648 (pattern target and measured objective)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 0.5700 on H4 timeframe would break above the double top resistance and negate the bearish reversal pattern, suggesting continuation higher.

## Macro & Flow Context

CAD facing headwinds amid risk-off sentiment while CHF benefits from safe-haven demand during geopolitical uncertainty. CFD momentum alignment supports the bearish pattern completion scenario.
